_meta.note: Official Minato City facilities (whole ward). Source: Minato City Open Data (CC BY). Coordinates/names/categories are official values; english_plain = official English name; yasashii_jp pending Gemini. Includes 3 water points (Tokyo Waterworks disaster water stations, data date 2025-12-11, type=water_point).
_meta.source: Minato City Open Data (CC BY equivalent; attribution required)
_meta.source_year: 2026 (Minato open data, current; each record carries a source_url)
_meta.WARNING: Year rule: facilities = 2026 current; minor-population distribution (not wired) = 2020 census. Never mix the two.
_meta.water_source: Tokyo Waterworks water-supply point list (data date 2025-12-11)
_meta.elevation_note: GSI elevation (T.P.) merged for 311/311 points. Source: GSI elevation API DEM, 2026-06-23. >50m = out-of-ward flag (Hakone retreat facilities), excluded from flood cards.
